projectDescription: Cambria is a family-owned, American-made manufacturer of natural quartz countertops and surfaces, offering an extensive design palette with a transferable Full Lifetime Warranty.
keyFeatures: Natural quartz surfaces with 93% quartz content — one of the hardest minerals on Earth
Maintenance free — no sealing, polishing, or reconditioning ever required
Transferable Full Lifetime Warranty included with every purchase
Broadest design palette in the industry across hundreds of exclusive designs
Four surface finishes: Polished, Cambria Matte®, Cambria Satin™, Cambria Luxe™
Available in 1cm, 2cm, and 3cm thicknesses with 19+ edge profile options
Nonporous, nonabsorbent, stain resistant, and NSF-51 food safety certified
GREENGUARD Gold certified for low VOC emissions
Family-owned and proudly American made — 95%+ of costs reinvested in the U.S. economy
Available for kitchens, bathrooms, shower walls, fireplaces, wall cladding, and furniture
Cambria University™ training program for fabricators and installers
30+ U.S. distribution centers with nationwide dealer and showroom network
publicApiSurface: Product designs: St. Isley™, Traymore Bay™, Claremont™, Kenwood™, Brittanicca®, Everleigh Warm™, and 200+ more
Finishes: Polished, Cambria Matte®, Cambria Satin™, Cambria Luxe™
Slab sizes: Standard (122″ x 55.5″), Jumbo (132″ x 65.5″)
Edge profiles: Seacliff, Ridgeline, Treeline, Volcanic, Summit, Piedmont, Cascade, Rimrock, and more
Cambria University™ training for trade professionals
